title: GalleryappGraphlibStore SubscriptionStore and NotificationStore implementations
content:
**Repo:** ~/projects/galleryapp. **Why:** the slice's fan-out half —
subscriptions match publish events to followers and notifications persist
for the in-app feed. Follows the exact bridging pattern established by the
GraphStore leaf (spawn_blocking over `DbPool`, errors to
`GraphlibError::StorageError`); this is mechanical extension, not new design.

## What

Extend `src-tauri/src/daemon/graphlib_store.rs`:

- `#[async_trait] impl graphlib::storage::SubscriptionStore for GalleryappGraphlibStore`:
  `subscribe` (generate a `sub_<uuid>` id; serialize
  `SubscriptionFilter` to `filter_json`), `unsubscribe`,
  `subscriptions_for`, `subscribers_of`. Crib SQL + serialization from
  `graphlib/src/sqlite.rs`.
- `#[async_trait] impl graphlib::storage::NotificationStore for GalleryappGraphlibStore`:
  `store_notification`, `notifications_for` (unread_only filter, newest
  first), `mark_read`, `mark_all_read`, `unread_count`,
  `delete_notification`.
- Keep default paginated variants.

## Tests (`#[cfg(test)]`, `#[tokio::test]`, against `db::test_pool()`)

- subscribe → subscriptions_for/subscribers_of round-trip; unsubscribe
  removes; filter_json survives round-trip with event_kinds +
  metadata_match set.
- store → notifications_for(unread_only) ordering; mark_read /
  mark_all_read flip read state; unread_count tracks; delete removes;
  notifications_for_page sanity.

## Acceptance

- `graphlib::subscribe::SubscriptionEngine` constructed over GalleryappGraphlibStore
  (store + `.with_notification_store(..)` + `.with_graph_store(..)`)
  delivers a NewContent event to a subscriber in one test — including the
  block-suppression path (blocked source produces no notification).
- `cargo test` + `cargo clippy -- -D warnings` green in `src-tauri/`.

## Files

`src-tauri/src/daemon/graphlib_store.rs` (extend), tests in-file.
depends_on: GalleryappGraphlibStore GraphStore implementation over the daemon pool
